zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Davidson於1617年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Robert Davidson17歲，母親Marion Young17歲。她於大約1628年與John Cunnyngham在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年4月9日在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Davidson于1617年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Robert Davidson17岁，母亲Marion Young17岁。她于大约1628年与John Cunnyngham在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年4月9日在苏格兰Linlithgowshire享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davidson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, northern English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name David + -son. As a Jewish name, the last element comes from German Sohn ‘son’.
Irish (Down) and Scottish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Daibhéid ‘son of David’; see McDevitt .
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Davidsson: patronymic from the personal name David .

variants.name: David
meanings: Jewish, Welsh, Scottish, English, French, Breton, Portuguese, Czech, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Dávid), Slovak (mainly Dávid): from the Hebrew personal name David (in Hungarian and Slovak spelled Dávid), interpreted as ‘beloved’. The name has been perennially popular among Jews, in honor of the Biblical king of this name. His prominence, and the vivid narrative of his life contained in the First Book of Samuel, led to adoption of the name among Christians in the Middle Ages in various parts of Europe. In Britain, the popularity of this as a personal name was increased for two reasons. Firstly by virtue of its being the name of the patron saint of Wales who was abbot-bishop in the 6th century at what became known as Saint David's in Pembrokeshire. There are numerous dedications and placenames honouring the saint in south Wales, and it is no coincidence that the modern surname is heavily concentrated there, especially in Glamorgan. Secondly, the name was borne by two kings of Scotland (David I, reigning 1124–53, and David II, 1329–71). Its popularity in Russia is largely due to the fact that this was the ecclesiastical name adopted by Saint Gleb (died 1015), one of two sons of Prince Vladimir of Kiev who were martyred for their Christian zeal. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from some other languages, especially Assyrian/Chaldean Dawid and Arabic Daud (with variants, such as Daoud and Dawood ).

History: Guillaume David from France married Marie Armand in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Davidson was born in 1617, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Robert Davidson, was 17 and her mother, Marion Young, was 17. She married John Cunnyngham about 1628, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 9 April 1688, in Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Davidson est née en 1617, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Robert Davidson, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Marion Young, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Cunnyngham environ 1628, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 avril 1688, à Linlithgowshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Davidson 1617 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Davidson 17 und ihre Mutter Marion Young 17. Sie hat um 1628 in Schottland, United Kingdom John Cunnyngham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. April 1688 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davidson è nata il nel 1617 nel Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Davidson, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Marion Young, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Cunnyngham circa 1628, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 aprile 1688, nel Linlithgowshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Davidson(이)가 1617년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Davidson(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Young(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1628년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 John Cunnyngham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 4월 9일 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davidson nasceu em 1617, em Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Davidson, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Marion Young, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cunnyngham aproximadamente 1628, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de abril de 1688, em Linlithgowshire, Scotland, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Davidson родилась в 1617 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Davidson было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Young, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cunnyngham около 1628 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 апреля 1688 г. в местности Linlithgowshire, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Davidson nació en 1617, en Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Robert Davidson, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Marion Young, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Cunnyngham aproximadamente 1628, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de abril de 1688, en Linlithgowshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años.
